design_name: R1.75 shaped catch radial-soft lapse-cushion v1
status: reduced-geometry freeze candidate; prescribed-geometry source-ledger diagnostic, not a matter model
validity_note: Validated as a tuned V=10 branch; lower V branches are safe; V>10 fails quickly in the current uniform radial-softening architecture.

support.radial_softening: uniform support-edge widening near high-resolution safety boundary

lapse_cushion.role: restores packet causal margin spent by radial softening

catch_rematch.lesson: support-side catch may lead slightly; packet rematch must remain tightly locked

core_lessons: Tkk exposure responds to shaped locked-lead catch/rematch timing.
Radial pressure p_l responds to radial support-edge widening.
Packet safety responds to lapse cushioning.
Uniform radial softening has a narrow high-resolution safety cliff near V=10.
The naive asymmetric radial shoulder did not outperform ordinary widening in the tested proxy branch.
